author: doll-agent
content:
Done — DType::Struct landed at the dtype layer.

Design: DType::Struct(&'static [FieldDescriptor]) — slice reference (not Arc) keeps DType: Copy intact, avoiding ~100-site by-value rewrite. FerrayRecord derive's field_descriptors() returns the right shape directly:
    let dt = DType::Struct(<Point as FerrayRecord>::field_descriptors());

Updates:
- size_of/alignment compute over fields (lost const-ness).
- Display emits 'struct[(name, dtype), ...]' matching numpy.
- promotion::dtype_ord places Struct at ord 200; promote_dtypes returns None for any Struct involvement.
- DynArray::cast and zeros return InvalidDtype with clear message - the DynArray-side Struct variant is next-step work.
- FieldDescriptor: derive Hash.

5 tests covering size, alignment, Display, equality+hash, Copy regression-pin.

ferray-core: 634 -> 639 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Workspace builds clean. Commit 119ebd36.
